easter-almonds-teleculinaria.name: Easter Almonds
instructions: Lay the ground almond in a bowl, add the sugar and cocoa powder and mix it well.
Then add the light and love everything very well until it becomes a moldable mixture.
Then mold small ''almonds'' with the previous mixture. Pass them through cocoa powder and serve them.

egg-stuffed-mushrooms-teleculinaria.name: Egg-stuffed Mushrooms

ingredients.item: Sal e pimenta preta de moinho q.b.

instructions: Wipe the mushrooms with absorbent paper, remove their feet and dispose of them on a tray, lined with vegetable paper, with the hat facing down.
Break an egg inside each mushroom, season with salt and pepper and light in the oven, preheated at 180oC for about 5 minutes. Remove, sprinkle with grated parmesan and serve.

eggplant-puree-a-recipe-for-the-whole-fa.name: Eggplant Puree, A Recipe For The Whole Family
eggplant-puree-a-recipe-for-the-whole-fa.original_name: Puré de berenjenas, una receta para toda la familia
instructions: We put some extra virgin olive oil in a frying pan and we revom the minced onion, and as soon as we start to get golden we add the tomato we revom a few minutes.
We put the eggplant cut into daditos, we revoke a little and we add 200 million water, we cover and let them cook with soft heat about 10 minutes.
We put everything in the beaker's glass with the cheesebes and the oregano we have and we have to serve hot and enjoy them.

enjoy-sardine-pate-comedera.name: Enjoy Sardine Pate
instructions: Open the sardines can and drain water or oil from the recipient. Take out the pieces and with a fork, remove his spine and put his back aside.
Once his thorns have been removed, his pulp remains from his sardines.
Peel his teeth with garlic and steak. Cut the onion into pieces.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and sock garlic and ion for two minutes. Turn it off.
In a processor or licebier, it incorporates sardine pulp, garlic and ion frying, cream cheese, lemon juice chorrit, salt and pepper to taste.
Processes all the ingredients till pate or an unusual cream forms.
Once that texture has been achieved, rectify salt and pack into a glass bin.
Fairy with salted or roasted cookies.

ever-split-pea-soup.name: Ever Split Pea Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add onion, carrot, celery, and garlic; cook and stir until onion is translucent, 5 to 7 minutes.
Stir in broth, split peas, and seasoning blend; cover and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring frequently, until split peas are tender, about 2 ½ hours.
Puree the soup with an immersion blender and serve.
